content:
The given code is already correct. It splits the input string by spaces and then further splits each resulting string by "–" to get the product details. It retrieves the product price from a predefined list (priceList) using the product name as the key, converts the order price into an integer, and assigns it back to orderPrice.

Please note that this code assumes that the priceList contains prices for all products listed in orderData[0]. If there are any missing products or if the product details do not match with the price list, you may need to handle these cases according to your specific requirements.
